awesomeListMeta.description: Lovingly crafted AppImage tools and resources

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Tools to convert from other package formats
nodes.itemHTML: • GMAppImagerstars3 - Graphically Converts GameMaker Studio 2 games to AppImage bundles.

• appenvstars0 - Small C++ library telling where the app data resides and where the user data is by using readlink("/proc/self/exe")), thus allowing C++ applications to become relocatable in the filesystem.
• gnome_appimage_installerstars1 - Somewhat a misnomer (AppImages don't need to be "installed"), creates a desktop file that follows the freedesktop.org spec for your AppImage files; written in bash.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Tools to convert from other package formats
nodes.itemHTML: • Package-to-appimagestars1 - Tool for converting .deb and .rpm packages into AppImage format by using Docker.
• AppImage-Integratorstars0 - A simple program to integrate AppImages into the Linux desktop written in Qt6.
• leapstars3 - Fast and simple AppImage manager. Written in Rust.
• rules_appimagestars1 - Bazel rules to package any lang_binary target as AppImage.

• XApp Thumbnailersstars20 - Thumbnailers for GTK Desktop Environments, including one for the AppImage file format. Makes Gtk based file managers like Caja (MATE), Nautilus (GNOME), Nemo (Cinnamon), PCManFM (LXDE), and Thunar (Xfce) show application icons on AppImages.
• Zenwalk GNU Linux - Is "AppImage ready" and distributes some applications in AppImage format.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Tools to convert from other package formats
nodes.itemHTML: • appimage-bashstars0 - GitHub Action for creating AppImage releases from binaries inside .tar.gz archives.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Tools to convert from other package formats
nodes.itemHTML: • arch2appimagestars312 - Python script to convert any Arch Linux package (official/AUR) to an AppImage.
• Manjaro Software Discover - Web-based app store that contains applications in multiple formats, including AppImage.
• ayystars15 - Package manager for AppImage. Single, static, dependency free binary. Written in Go.
• jewelrystore - Command line AppImage store made in ruby.
• Linux Mint - Has an AppImage thumbnailerstars20 to show application icons on AppImage files.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for Electron applications
nodes.itemHTML: • electron-forge-maker-appimagestars4 - Electron Forge builder for AppImage.
• Get AppImage - Collection of all AppImages in one website. Great search functionality.
• Getting Started Managing Software with AppImage on Ubuntu - Verbosely explains how to manage AppImages without the need for further software.
• AppImage Sandboxing Projectstars14 - Golang library to help sandbox AppImages with bwrap.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for .NET Core (Mono) applications
nodes.itemHTML: • Publish-AppImage for .NETstars11 - Publish AppImages for .NET applications.
• AppManstars29 - AppImage Manager that works like APT or Pacman.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for Rust applications
nodes.itemHTML: • Cargo AppImagestars22 - Cargo program that allows you to convert your Rust programs into AppImages.
• AppImage.cmakestars4 - CMake script which facilitates generating AppImage executables for Linux.
• AppImage To Gnomestars2 - Monitors and (de)installs AppImages from the Gnome desktop.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for Flash applications
nodes.itemHTML: • flash-to-appimagestars2 - Script to package a Flash game (.swf) into an AppImage.
• AppImagePoolstars470 - Simple, modern AppImageHub Client, powered by flutter.
• RookiePMstars1 - Package manager for AppImages and Shell Scripts.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for Windows applications
nodes.itemHTML: • ferion11/Wine_Appimagestars34 - AppImage for WINE 32bits from PlayOnLinux, an run on no-multilib systems.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for Electron applications
nodes.itemHTML: • Appnativefystars138 - Create AppImage with embedded Electron browser from any website.
• #AppImage channel on libera.chat - Chat where AppImage developers and users hang out, be prepared to stay in the channel for days if you don't get answers immediately.
• Thumbnailer for AppImagesstars5 - Generates icons for AppImages that are shown in file managers of GNOME and KDE compatible desktop environments.
• QAppImageUpdatestars25 - Qt5 library and plugin for updating AppImages, can be embedded into applications.
• The Background Story of AppImage - Interview with the creator of AppImage, explaining the key ideas and motivations behind the concept.
• AppImage: Portable applications for Linux - Official AppImage introduction video by its founder.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for Python applications
nodes.itemHTML: • PyAppImagestars14 - Ultimately simple python-to-appimage bundler.

• Deepin - When you double-click an AppImage or any other executable file that lacks execute permissions, a user-friendly dialog explains the situation and asks for your permission to set the execute permission and execute the executable.
• Nitrux - Promotes the use of AppImage as the main format for getting applications, has a built in app center featuring AppImages.
• mini-qmlstars45 - Minimal Qml application template with deployment for Linux (AppImage), Windows, macOS and WebAssembly.
• Link to the latest build artifact on GitLab CI - Example of how to directly link to the latest build artifact on GitLab CI (can be tricky).

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for .NET Core (Mono) applications
nodes.itemHTML: • .NET Core AppImage example - Example of how to deploy .NET Core (Mono) applications as an AppImage using dotnet publish -f netcoreapp3.1 -r linux-x64 from within a .cs program.
• Firejailstars4.5k - Optional sandbox with support for AppImage built in.
• AppImage Desktop Makerstars3 - Creates menu entries for AppImages without the need for a daemon.
• Zapstars331 - AppImage package manager. Downloads the AppImage if it does not exist. If it already exists, updates it with AppImageUpdate. Integrates AppImage into the system.
• AppStream Generator - Very simple generator for AppStream MetaInfo files which application authors can use to add metadata (like descriptions, screenshots, links) to their AppImage.
• AppStream MetaInfo Creator - More elaborate generator for AppStream MetaInfo files by the author of the AppStream metainfo format.
• help-wanted - AppImage issues that the AppImage team would like your help with. A great way to get started contributing to the project.
• appimage.yml - Bigger, more complex example of how to build and upload AppImages using GitHub Actions.
• GitHub Actions example - Example of how to upload AppImages built using GitHub Actions to GitHub Releases.
• appimage-testsuitestars17 - AppImage testing environment based on Docker containers for various Linux distributions.
• Qt Desktop Templatestars0 - Template for creating Qt Widgets desktop applications with AppImage generation using linuxdeployqt.
• qt-hello-worldstars1 - Qt Hello World project for AppImage creation using appimage-builder.
• Flatpak, Snap and AppImage - Jesse Smith on DistroWatch about AppImage, Flatpak and Snap.
• Don't Install, Just Copy with klik - Article from 2005 that gives perspective on how AppImage started, relevant only for historical reasons now.
• Stack Overflow - Questions tagged [appimage] on Stack Overflow.
• jniltinho/packagesstars5 - Drone.io example for producing AppImages using go-appimagetool.
• AppImage.GitHub.io - Catalog of AppImages that passed an automated test, links to upstream download pages.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for Python applications
nodes.itemHTML: • Briefcase - Convert Python project into a standalone native application, e.g., using AppImage.
• appimagelintstars27 - Tool to check AppImages for compatibility, best practices etc.
• libzsync-gostars8 - Zsync implementation written in Go that can be used to update AppImages.
• Desktop Entry Specification - Specification for the matadata used inside AppImages.
• appimage-builder.readthedocs.io - Documentation of appimage-builder, includes tutorials, examples, and more.
• AppImage system integration on Ubuntu using go-appimaged - New appimaged daemon from the go-appimage implementation.
• AppImageHub.com - Downloadable AppImages, powered by Opendesktop.org.
• pling.com - Open store where creators can publish their libre products and creative content including AppImages.
• App Outlet - Universal app store that works with AppImages, Flatpaks and Snaps.
• Linux App Store - Universal app store for Linux applications in AppImage, Flatpak, and Snap formats (project abandoned).
• NX Software Centerstars107 - Portable Software Center for portable AppImage applications.
• appimages.scraperstars8 - Search for AppImage releases over the web.
• AppImageRadarstars13 - Search for AppImage-related activity on GitHub using Travis CI.
• go-appimaged - Optional daemon that integrates AppImages into the system (experimental).

• AppImageLauncherstars3.1k - Integrates into users' systems and establishes a single ~/Applications directory, assisting the user to move AppImages into there, with support for updating and removing AppImages through apps launcher.
• appimage2desktop - Creates a desktop file and an icon in the system for an AppImage, nothing else.
• appimagehelper - Program for creating, deleting, controlling and organizing shortcuts to AppImage.
• LinuxPAstars21 - PortableApps.com type launcher for Linux with AppImage support.
• AppImageUpdatestars423 - Official grapical application to update AppImages; command-line tool to update AppImages.
• AppImageUpdaterstars31 - Simple updater for humans written in C++ and Qt.
• appimage-updatestars2 - AppImage Update implementation written in Go.
• appimage-managerstars77 - Command-line tool for managing AppImages allowing to search, install, remove and update applications.
• bauhstars609 - Graphical user interface for managing Linux applications supporting AppImage, Arch (repositories/AUR), Flatpak, Snap and native Web applications.
• homebrew-appimagestars8 - Linuxbrew AppImage Formulae.
• AIPMstars14 - A Package Manager for AppImages.
• appimagetool - Converts AppDirs into AppImages.
• nix-bundlestars454 - Converts Nix derivations into AppImages.
• appimagecraftstars26 - Recipe based AppImage creation tool working from source.
• appimage-builderstars200 - Recipe based AppImage creation tool working from source.
• KDE Craft - Build system used by KDE that can produce AppImages and other formats.
• appimage-tooling - Ruby tooling to generate Appimages.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for compiled applications
nodes.itemHTML: • go-appimagetool - Tool that deploys dependencies into AppDirs, and converts AppDirs into AppImages (experimental).

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for compiled applications
nodes.itemHTML: • linuxdeployqtstars1.7k - Deploys dependencies into AppDirs and creates AppImages; for Qt and other compiled applications.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for compiled applications
nodes.itemHTML: • linuxdeploystars326 - AppDir creation and maintenance tool using plugins.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for Python applications
nodes.itemHTML: • python-appimagestars104 - Ready to use AppImage distributions of Python (can be modified to include your application).

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for Python applications
nodes.itemHTML: • linuxdeploy-plugin-pythonstars20 - Bundle Python into an AppDir using a source distribution and linuxdeploy.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for Python applications
nodes.itemHTML: • linuxdeploy-plugin-condastars24 - Bundle Python into an AppDir using a source distribution, Conda, and linuxdeploy.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for Python applications
nodes.itemHTML: • pycharm-appimage-support - Deploy Python project as an AppImage directly from the PyCharm IDE.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for Electron applications
nodes.itemHTML: • electron-builderstars12.4k - Supports AppImage as an output format.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for Windows applications
nodes.itemHTML: • wine32-deploystars48 - Creates AppImages for 32-bit Windows applications that can run on 64-bit Linux systems without multilib installed.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for Windows applications
nodes.itemHTML: • AppImage For WINEstars469 - WINE-based AppImages and LD_PRELOAD based patches to launch WINE from AppImages.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Deployment tools for Java applications
nodes.itemHTML: • nbPackagerstars7 - Packages NetBeans Platform Application with a JRE for AppImage, Linux, macOS and Windows.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Tools to convert from other package formats
nodes.itemHTML: • pkg2appimagestars582 - Converts from deb, zip, tar.gz and other formats to AppImage using YAML recipes.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Tools to convert from other package formats
nodes.itemHTML: • appimage2pkg - Repack AppImage and make rpm/deb which does not require FUSE.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Tools to convert from other package formats
nodes.itemHTML: • flatpak2appdirstars20 - Turn Flatpak into AppDir which in turn can be turned into AppImage.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Tools to convert from other package formats
nodes.itemHTML: • make-portablestars15 - Deploys installed application to AppDir, uses strace to fetch all file system calls and copies all accessed files in to AppDir including glibc.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Tools to convert from other package formats
nodes.itemHTML: • AppImage cobbler - Python application that takes strace.log and turns it into a directory suited for an AppImage.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Tools to convert from other package formats
nodes.itemHTML: • Elements - Tool to generate single-file, runc-based AppImages using a minimal (~3 MB compressed) Alpine Linux rootfs.
• build-appimage-actionstars17 - GitHub Action for producing AppImages using appimage-builder.
• AppImageServicesstars4 - D-Bus services providing a high-level interface over the AppImage manipulation libraries for file managers, software centers and other tools.
• libappimagestars31 - Implements functionality for dealing with AppImage files, written in C++ using Boost.

• qt-qml-project-template-with-cistars33 - Template for a Qt/QML application with batteries included: GitHub CI, automated GUI testing, automatic code-format checks and more. Compiles for Linux (AppImage), Mac, and Android.
• wxWidgetsTemplatestars15 - Cross-platform application template for wxWidgets C++, with pre-set files and IDE projects, supporting AppImage.
• Briefcase Linux AppImage Templatestars12 - Cookiecutter template for building Python apps that will run under Linux, packaged as an AppImage.
• AppImageSpecstars45 - Official specification for the AppImage format.
• docs.appimage.org - Official AppImage documentation.

• Produce an AppImage that bundles everything with go-appimage - How to make an AppImage that bundles all required libraries so that it should run not only on newer, but also on older systems than the build system.
• Comparing Linux Package Formats - Deb, Flatpak, AppImage, etc. - By Bryan Lunduke.
• AppImage: Universal Linux Apps, Overview and Thoughts - By Jeremy "Jay" LaCroix, LearnLinuxTV.
• Integrate and Manage AppImages with AppImageLauncher - By Eric Adams.
• Mastering Qt 5 - Contains a section on how to package and deploy Qt applications for Linux using linuxdeployqt.
• Planet AppImage - Blog Aggregator covering all things AppImage.
• TheAssassin Blog - Blog covering AppImage related topics by TheAssassin.
• AppImage Crafters Blog - Blog about AppImage creation an usage by azubieta.
• discourse.appimage.org - Official AppImage forum for users and application developers.
• r/AppImage/ - AppImage subreddit.
• AppImage wiki - Official AppImage wiki.
• AppImageZip - Experimental pure Rust implementation of the AppImage runtime that uses Zip as the backing file system image.
• Similar projects - Comparison to other packaging systems.
• awesome-linuxdeploystars24 - Awesome list on linuxdeploy.
• All Awesome Lists - All the Awesome lists on GitHub.
• appimagedstars273 - Optional daemon that integrates AppImages into the system (deprecated).
